title: Vadamalikari Song Lyrics Kozhi Koovuthu
stanzas: <div>Vaadaa Malli Kaari Lyrics Kozhi Koovuthu

Vaadaamallikaari
en varungaala kolakaari.
koda mazhaiyaa maari
enna nenachaaye mumaari.

poratti poata aamaiya pola
manasu kedakkuthadi
nananju pona ellu chediya
usuru nazhuvuthadi

usuru en usuru
en manasa parikkaathe
manasu en manasu
en vayassa murikkaathe

usure en usure
en manasa madhikkaathe
usure en usure
en usura kadikkaathe

Unn yaenda paathen
naan nethuthaanda poothen
naan thaavanikkul molaichen
naan thaavi kudhichen naan.

vekka kaadaa aanen
naan vetkam kettu ponen.
naan kozhi kunjaa aanen
naan koova marandhen naa.

thoratti potu izhukkura enna
kundu kanna ennadi panna.
ayyo ayyo enna kollaathe.

velanji nikkum veththala kodiya
mennu paakka ilukkura sariyaa
kolakaari sollendi
poi mattum sollaathe..

usuru en usuru
en manasa parikkaathe
manasu en manasu
en vayassa murikkaathe

usure en usure
en manasa madhikkaathe
usure en usure
en usura kadikkaathe

Kaanji kadantha sengaadu
kannam pattu poothaachu
nenju paakka variyaa ne
ezhai kalavaani.

veedu muzhukka un vaasam
veratti veratti kadha pesum
veliya sangosham
enna suvakaasam.

en ullukkulla unna nanachaa
uchchan thalaiyil kombu
mulaikkum.
yeno yeno vidaiyum
theriyaathe.

eera kaatta uzhuvathu pola
poratti pota ennaiyum mella
thadai solla mudiyaama
thalaiyaatti ninnene

usuru en usuru
enna usuppi edukkaatha
manasu en manasu
en adichu thuvaikkaatha

usure en usure
en manasa madhikkaathe
usure en usure
en usura kadikkaathe

Vaadaamallikaari
en varungaala kolakaari.
koda mazhaiyaa maari
enna nenachaaye mumaari.

poratti poata aamaiya pola
manasu kedakkuthadi
nananju pona ellu chediya
usuru nazhuvuthadi

usuru en usuru
en manasa parikkaathe
manasu en manasu
en vayassa murikkaathe

en usure en usure
en moocha niruththaathe
manase en manase
en vaatti varukkaathe.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Vadamalikari?

The song Vadamalikari expresses themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of a romantic relationship.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Kozhi Koovuthu?

In Kozhi Koovuthu, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song is sung by Anuradha Sriram and E.S. Ramraj, both of whom bring a unique charm to the melody.

When was the song released?

Vadamalikari was released on December 28, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Vadamalikari from the movie Kozhi Koovuthu beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and yearning. It features a duet that showcases the emotional depth of the characters' relationship, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. Overall, this song is a melodic journey through the complexities of romance.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vadamalikari is a beautifully crafted duet that captures the essence of romance and longing. With the enchanting voices of Anuradha Sriram and E.S. Ramraj, this song from the movie Kozhi Koovuthu resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of heartfelt lyrics and melodious tunes that transport you to a world of love and emotion.
stanzaMeanings: Oh, my dear Malli, you are my beautiful flower. When the rain comes, what do I think about?
My heart is restless like a turtle that has lost its way, and my breath feels heavy like a burden.
My breath, my breath, don't disturb my heart; my heart, my heart, don't age too quickly.
My breath, my breath, don't get confused; my breath, my breath, don't get lost.
I saw you, and I bloomed like a flower; I got lost in your beauty and forgot everything.
I became a bird and flew away; I got scared and ran away. I forgot that I was a little chick.
With my eyes closed, I am feeling lost; oh no, don't take me away from here.
The farmer is standing with his harvest; don't just look at me, tell me what to do. Oh no, don't take me away.
Don't just say it, tell me the truth about the beautiful flower that stands tall.
My breath, my breath, don't disturb my heart; my heart, my heart, don't age too quickly.
My breath, my breath, don't get confused; my breath, my breath, don't get lost.
The porridge has boiled over, and the heart is filled with joy; will you come to see my heart?
In this house, your presence is a blessing; the outside world is filled with noise, but I am lucky.
Inside my heart, when I think of you, my head feels heavy. I don't know why the seeds are not sprouting.
Like a snake shedding its skin, when I lose my way, I can't speak softly, and I can't stand still.
My breath, my breath, don't take away my strength; my heart, my heart, don't break apart.
My breath, my breath, don't get confused; my breath, my breath, don't get lost.
Oh, my dear Malli, you are my beautiful flower. When the rain comes, what do I think about?
My heart is restless like a turtle that has lost its way, and my breath feels heavy like a burden.
My breath, my breath, don't disturb my heart; my heart, my heart, don't age too quickly.
My breath, my breath, don't get confused; my breath, my breath, don't get lost.
